# Description

This PR addresses code quality issues identified by Codacy analysis and implements critical fixes.

## Changes

### SES Analysis Implementation
- Added new Socioeconomic Status (SES) analysis module
- Implemented comprehensive test suite for SES calculations
- Added input validation and error handling
- Support multiple SES calculation methods with configurable weights

### Codacy Code Analysis Results
- Documented comprehensive code analysis findings
- Mapped test framework structure and dependencies
- Identified critical security concerns
- Created refactoring strategy for complexity reduction
- Added detailed improvement roadmap

## Testing
- Existing test suite runs successfully
- Added new tests for SES analysis functionality
- Documented test framework structure

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [x] Code quality improvement
- [x] Documentation update

## Security Considerations
- Identified Flask security configuration issue
- Documented security improvement plan
- Added security-focused test requirements

## Next Steps
1. Critical security fixes for Flask configuration
2. Code organization improvements
3. Function deduplication
4. Import cleanup
5. Code complexity reduction
6. Testing strategy implementation
7. Documentation updates
